events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Kaiser Permanente San Francisco for client 1143. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic, cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 650 mg/meal, carbs 45–65 g/meal. Prefers Mediterranean; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: stovetop. 10 meals/week, zone Sunset.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Baked Cod with Herbed Couscous
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 41 g outside 45–65 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Tabbouleh with Grilled Chicken
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 40 g outside 45–65 g range.

events.title: Matched: Hearty Lentil Soup with Vegetables
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 410/650 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 45–65) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Quinoa-Stuffed Bell Peppers
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 417/650 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 45–65) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Hummus and Veggie Wrap
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 451/650 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 45–65) ✓.

events.title: Batch allocated: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B2 (100 servings, 7 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Donation D002 feeds batch B2
events.detail: Fresh Bok Choy (cases), Carrots (25 lb bags) from Bay Area Produce Exchange — triaged as kitchen ingredient.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1143 added to route R-SUNS-1 (Sunset), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1143: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 1. 0 hard-constraint violations.
